en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When you come into the land you are to inhabit, which I am giving you,
zh: “你要告訴以色列人：你們進入我賜給你們居住之地的時候，

en: and you offer to the LORD from the herd or from the flock a food offering or a burnt offering or a sacrifice, to fulfill a vow or as a freewill offering or at your appointed feasts, to make a pleasing aroma to the LORD,
zh: 如果要從牛群或羊群，拿牛羊作火祭獻給耶和華，無論是燔祭，或是其他的祭，為要還特許的願，或是作甘心的祭，或是在你們的節期獻上的，都要獻給耶和華作為馨香的祭；

en: then he who brings his offering shall offer to the LORD a grain offering of a tenth of an ephah of fine flour, mixed with a quarter of a hin of oil;
zh: 那獻供物的，要把一公斤細麵和一公斤油調和作素祭，獻給耶和華。

en: and you shall offer with the burnt offering, or for the sacrifice, a quarter of a hin of wine for the drink offering for each lamb.
zh: 此外，無論是燔祭或是別的祭，為每隻綿羊羔你要一同獻上一公升作奠祭的酒。

en: Or for a ram, you shall offer for a grain offering two tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with a third of a hin of oil.
zh: 或是為每隻公綿羊，你要一同獻上兩公斤細麵，用一公升半油調和作素祭；

en: And for the drink offering you shall offer a third of a hin of wine, a pleasing aroma to the LORD.
zh: 你也要用一公升半酒作奠祭，獻給耶和華作馨香的祭。

en: And when you offer a bull as a burnt offering or sacrifice, to fulfill a vow or for peace offerings to the LORD,
zh: 你若是預備公牛犢作燔祭，或是別的祭，為要還特許的願，或是作平安祭，獻給耶和華，

en: then one shall offer with the bull a grain offering of three tenths of an ephah of fine flour, mixed with half a hin of oil.
zh: 就要把三公斤細麵，用兩公升油調和作素祭，和公牛犢一同獻上；

en: And you shall offer for the drink offering half a hin of wine, as a food offering, a pleasing aroma to the LORD.
zh: 也要用兩公升酒作奠祭，獻給耶和華為馨香的火祭。

en: "Thus it shall be done for each bull or ram, or for each lamb or young goat.
zh: “獻一頭公牛，或一隻公綿羊，或一隻綿羊羔，或一隻山羊羔，都要這樣辦理。

en: As many as you offer, so shall you do with each one, as many as there are.
zh: 照著你們預備的數目，每隻都要這樣辦理。

en: Every native Israelite shall do these things in this way, in offering a food offering, with a pleasing aroma to the LORD.
zh: 本地人獻馨香的火祭給耶和華，都要這樣辦理。

en: And if a stranger is sojourning with you, or anyone is living permanently among you, and he wishes to offer a food offering, with a pleasing aroma to the LORD, he shall do as you do.
zh: 如果有外人與你們同住，或有人世世代代住在你們中間的，要獻馨香的火祭給耶和華；你們怎樣辦理，他也要怎樣辦理。

en: For the assembly, there shall be one statute for you and for the stranger who sojourns with you, a statute forever throughout your generations. You and the sojourner shall be alike before the LORD.
zh: 至於會眾，無論是你們，或是與你們同住的外人，都一樣的規例，作你們世世代代永遠的規例；在耶和華面前，你們怎樣，寄居的人也怎樣。

en: One law and one rule shall be for you and for the stranger who sojourns with you."
zh: 你們和住在你們中間的外人，都只有一樣的法規，一樣的典章。”

en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When you come into the land to which I bring you
zh: “你要告訴以色列人：你們到了我領你們進去的那地，

en: and when you eat of the bread of the land, you shall present a contribution to the LORD.
zh: 吃那地的糧食的時候，就要把舉祭獻給耶和華。

en: Of the first of your dough you shall present a loaf as a contribution; like a contribution from the threshing floor, so shall you present it.
zh: 你們要用初熟的麥麵作餅當舉祭獻上，你們獻時，好像獻上禾場的舉祭一樣。

en: Some of the first of your dough you shall give to the LORD as a contribution throughout your generations.
zh: 你們世世代代要把初熟的麥麵作舉祭獻給耶和華。

en: "But if you sin unintentionally, and do not observe all these commandments that the LORD has spoken to Moses,
zh: “如果你們作錯了事，沒有守耶和華吩咐摩西的這一切命令，

en: all that the LORD has commanded you by Moses, from the day that the LORD gave commandment, and onward throughout your generations,
zh: 就是耶和華藉摩西吩咐你們的一切事，從耶和華吩咐的那一天起，直到你們的世世代代；

en: then if it was done unintentionally without the knowledge of the congregation, all the congregation shall offer one bull from the herd for a burnt offering, a pleasing aroma to the LORD, with its grain offering and its drink offering, according to the rule, and one male goat for a sin offering.
zh: 如果有無心之失，是會眾不知道的，全體會眾就要把一頭公牛犢作燔祭，作為獻給耶和華馨香的祭，並且照著規章把素祭和奠祭一同獻上，又獻一隻公山羊作贖罪祭。

en: And the priest shall make atonement for all the congregation of the people of Israel, and they shall be forgiven, because it was a mistake, and they have brought their offering, a food offering to the LORD, and their sin offering before the LORD for their mistake.
zh: 祭司要為以色列全體會眾贖罪，他們就必蒙赦免；因為這是無心之失，他們又因自己的無心之失，把供物，就是獻給耶和華的火祭和贖罪祭，一起奉到耶和華面前，

en: And all the congregation of the people of Israel shall be forgiven, and the stranger who sojourns among them, because the whole population was involved in the mistake.
zh: 以色列全體會眾和寄居在他們中間的外人，就必蒙赦免，因為全體人民都犯了無心之失。

en: "If one person sins unintentionally, he shall offer a female goat a year old for a sin offering.
zh: “如果一個人誤犯了罪，他就要獻一隻一歲的母山羊作贖罪祭。

en: And the priest shall make atonement before the LORD for the person who makes a mistake, when he sins unintentionally, to make atonement for him, and he shall be forgiven.
zh: 祭司要在耶和華面前為那誤犯的人贖罪，因為他犯罪是出於無心；祭司為他贖罪，他就必蒙赦免。

en: You shall have one law for him who does anything unintentionally, for him who is native among the people of Israel and for the stranger who sojourns among them.
zh: 對於犯了無心之失的人，無論是本地人或是寄居在他們中間的外人，都有一樣的法例。

en: But the person who does anything with a high hand, whether he is native or a sojourner, reviles the LORD, and that person shall be cut off from among his people.
zh: 但那膽大妄為的人，無論是本地人或是寄居的，褻瀆了耶和華，那人總要從民間剪除。

en: Because he has despised the word of the LORD and has broken his commandment, that person shall be utterly cut off; his iniquity shall be on him."
zh: 因為他藐視耶和華的話，違犯耶和華的命令，那人必被剪除；他的罪孽要歸到他身上。”

en: While the people of Israel were in the wilderness, they found a man gathering sticks on the Sabbath day.
zh: 以色列人在曠野的時候，有一個人在安息日撿柴。

en: And those who found him gathering sticks brought him to Moses and Aaron and to all the congregation.
zh: 遇見他撿柴的人，就把他帶到摩西、亞倫和全體會眾那裡。

en: They put him in custody, because it had not been made clear what should be done to him.
zh: 他們把他收在監裡，因為要怎樣辦他，還未明朗。

en: And the LORD said to Moses, "The man shall be put to death; all the congregation shall stone him with stones outside the camp."
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“那人必須處死，全體會眾要在營外用石頭把他打死。”

en: And all the congregation brought him outside the camp and stoned him to death with stones, as the LORD commanded Moses.
zh: 於是全體會眾把他拉出營外，用石頭把他打死，正如耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: The LORD said to Moses,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Speak to the people of Israel, and tell them to make tassels on the corners of their garments throughout their generations, and to put a cord of blue on the tassel of each corner.
zh: “你要告訴以色列人，叫他們世世代代在自己衣服的邊上作繸子，又在繸子上，釘上一根藍色的細帶子；

en: And it shall be a tassel for you to look at and remember all the commandments of the LORD, to do them, not to follow after your own heart and your own eyes, which you are inclined to whore after.
zh: 這要作你們的繸子，叫你們一看見，就記得耶和華的一切命令，並且遵行；不隨從自己的心意和眼目亂跑，像你們素常亂跑行淫一樣，

en: So you shall remember and do all my commandments, and be holy to your God.
zh: 好使你們記得，並且遵行我的一切命令，又使你們成為聖潔，歸給你們的 神。

en: I am the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt to be your God: I am the LORD your God."
zh: 我是耶和華你們的 神，曾把你們從埃及地領出來，為要作你們的 神；我是耶和華你們的 神。”
